word: H8535 - תָּם - tâm - tawm - Coupled together

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּם

Transliteration: tâm

Phonetic: tawm

BDB Definition:

  1. perfect, complete
    1. complete, perfect
      1. one who lacks nothing in physical strength, beauty, etc
    2. sound, wholesome
      1. an ordinary, quiet sort of person
    3. complete, morally innocent, having integrity
      1. one who is morally and ethically pure

Origin: from H8552

TWOT entry: 2522c

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
